data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces the time it takes for users to make decisions by simplifying navigation.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu options and guided user paths.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes target sizes and positions to improve user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons and links.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Items close to each other are perceived as related, aiding cognitive processing.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of whitespace and grouping strategies.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Attempts to lessen cognitive load by organizing content in chunks easy for users to process.
data.technical_spec: Logical segmentation of information across the site.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer your site to work the same way as all other sites they already know.
data.technical_spec: Leverages common web conventions and familiar design patterns.
